svg.title: RxJS data flow — BehaviorSubject to subscribers
svg.desc: Left to right flow: BehaviorSubject pushes via .next(), Observable carries via asObservable(), subscribers receive via .subscribe(). Three components subscribe to the same stream and all update together.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me an example of deleteUser updating BehaviorSubject in Angular')
sendPrompt('How does async pipe work in Angular templates?')
